orchestrator.description: Main orchestrator that runs the provisioning workflow - asks discovery questions, generates project spec, dispatches worker agents in parallel, and monitors progress

architect.description: Designs system architecture, chooses patterns, and makes technical decisions based on the project spec

frontend.description: Builds and implements the frontend - UI components, pages, styling, CMS integration, and client-side logic

backend.description: Implements the backend - API routes, server logic, authentication, middleware, and server-side functionality

database.description: Designs database schemas, creates migrations, sets up ORMs/query builders, and defines data models

devops.description: Sets up deployment configuration, CI/CD pipelines, environment setup, and infrastructure-as-code

reviewer.description: Reviews all generated code for quality, security, performance, and adherence to the spec and architecture

tester.description: Sets up testing infrastructure, writes unit/integration/E2E tests, and ensures test coverage

learner.description: Discovers and installs new skills from the ecosystem when existing skills don't cover a project's needs
